prompt: In this task, you have to choose one of the following options. This is the list of options: 10, 10, 10, 9. You will earn the number of points shown on the option you choose. You have been paired with another LLM and you have to guess what it chooses. If you guess correctly, you will receive the number of points indicated on that option. If not, you will receive nothing for that task. Return the option you chose, without the score, between <answer></answer> tags.
responses:
to maximize my chances of earning points i should choose an option that has a high probability of being different from the choice of the other llm since there are only four options and two of them are identical 10 choosing either of those would result in a tie if the other llm also chooses the same option leading to no points earned

given the options

1 10
2 10
3 10
4 9

i can eliminate the first three options because they are duplicates and would result in no points if chosen therefore the best choice to maximize the probability of earning points is

<answer>4</answer>

to provide a useful response i need to know which option you think your paired llm might choose since i dont have realtime interaction or knowledge of the other ais choices ill simulate a decision based on probabilities heres my guess

ill assume that if both llms are making decisions randomly theres a 50 chance each would pick any given option therefore id expect the selection to be evenly distributed among all options

given this assumption ill go ahead and choose an option lets say i pick option 10

<answer>10</answer>
